title: Microsoft/Google Authenticator Setup
description: How to set up a mobile authenticator app for Two-Factor Authentication (2FA/MFA).

steps.title: Download the App
steps.instruction: Download 'Microsoft Authenticator' or 'Google Authenticator' from the iOS App Store or Android Google Play Store on your mobile device.

steps.title: Access Security Settings
steps.instruction: On your computer, log into your company account and navigate to Security Info or Two-Factor Authentication settings.

steps.title: Add a New Method
steps.instruction: Select 'Add sign-in method' and choose 'Authenticator app'. A QR code will be displayed on your computer screen.

steps.title: Scan the QR Code
steps.instruction: Open the Authenticator app on your phone, tap the '+' (plus) icon, select 'Work or school account' (or 'Scan a QR Code'), and scan the code on your screen.

steps.title: Verify Setup
steps.instruction: Enter the 6-digit code shown on your phone into the computer prompt to verify the setup.
